item.description:
# Shruti 1.2.0
Ads can't blast you anymore.
- **New: Steady Volume, per app.** Turn it on for your browser or any streaming app and Shruti learns the loudness you're actually listening at — then, when an ad break or a channel jump comes in louder, it rides the volume back down to your level within a fraction of a second, and eases back up when the program returns. Loud ads on a stream, screaming commentators, jarring volume jumps between videos: all held to the level you chose. - Downward only: quiet scenes are never pumped up, normal dialogue and music dynamics pass untouched, and it adds zero latency. - Right-click any app in the mixer → "Steady Volume — tame loud ads". Off by default; per app. - Everything from 1.1.9 (instant Follow-Me, stability fixes) is included.
